channel.title: ORIM™ Blog - Europe
channel.description: Articles on immunonutrition and preventive nutrition in Europe

item.title: Healthy Ageing in Europe: Nutritional Strategies to Maintain Immune Function | ORIM
item.description: Europe has the oldest population globally. Discover how immunonutrition addresses immunosenescence and supports healthy ageing across European populations. #healthyageing #immunosenescence #elderlynutrition #Europeandemographics #sarcopenia #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Antioxidant-Rich European Berries: Nature's Immune Defence from Field to Table | ORIM
item.description: European berries contain exceptional antioxidant concentrations. From Nordic bilberries to Mediterranean pomegranates, discover the science of berry-based immune support. #antioxidants #Europeanberries #polyphenols #anthocyanins #bilberry #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Autoimmune Diseases and Nutrition: European Immunonutrition Approaches | ORIM
item.description: Autoimmune diseases affect 5-8% of Europeans. Discover how targeted immunonutrition can help modulate overactive immune responses and reduce symptom burden. #autoimmunedisease #nutrition #immunemodulation #anti-inflammatorydiet #vitaminDautoimmunity #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: European Blue Zones: Longevity Secrets from Sardinia and Ikaria | ORIM
item.description: Sardinia and Ikaria are home to some of the longest-lived people on Earth. Discover the nutritional and lifestyle factors that European Blue Zone research has uncovered. #BlueZones #longevity #Sardinia #Ikaria #centenarians #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Bone Broth and Collagen Peptides: European Culinary Tradition Meets Gut Science | ORIM
item.description: Bone broth is deeply rooted in European culinary tradition. Modern European research investigates collagen peptides for gut integrity and joint health. #bonebroth #collagenpeptides #guthealth #jointhealth #Europeantradition #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Cardiovascular Health and European Dietary Patterns: What the Evidence Shows | ORIM
item.description: Cardiovascular disease remains Europe's leading cause of death. Discover how European dietary patterns and immunonutrition can protect your heart. #cardiovascularhealth #Europeandiet #heartdiseaseprevention #omega-3 #polyphenols #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Children's Immune Health in European Schools: Nutrition Strategies That Work | ORIM
item.description: European children face increasing immune challenges. Evidence-based school nutrition and supplementation strategies can build resilient immune systems from childhood. #childrenimmunehealth #schoolnutrition #paediatricimmunonutrition #childhoodimmunity #vitaminDchildren #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Cruciferous Vegetables and Cancer Prevention: European Research Insights | ORIM
item.description: Broccoli, cauliflower, and cabbage contain powerful anti-cancer compounds. European research reveals how sulforaphane and indoles support immune surveillance. #cruciferousvegetables #cancerprevention #sulforaphane #broccoli #indole-3-carbinol #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Dark Chocolate Flavanols: European Cocoa Science and Cardiovascular-Immune Benefits | ORIM
item.description: European chocolate-making tradition meets modern flavanol research. Discover how cocoa polyphenols support cardiovascular and immune health in evidence-based doses. #darkchocolate #flavanols #cocoapolyphenols #cardiovascularhealth #Europeanchocolate #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Detox Myths vs. Liver Function: What European Science Actually Says | ORIM
item.description: The #detoxmyths #liverfunction #hepaticdetoxification #milkthistle #antioxidantsliver #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Type 2 Diabetes Prevention in Europe: The Role of Immunonutrition | ORIM
item.description: Type 2 diabetes affects 60 million Europeans. Learn how targeted nutrition, supported by European clinical evidence, can reduce your risk dramatically. #diabetesprevention #type2diabetesEurope #bloodsugar #insulinsensitivity #nutritionintervention #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Epigenetics and Nutrition: How European Food Choices Influence Gene Expression | ORIM
item.description: Your diet can switch genes on and off without changing DNA. European epigenetics research reveals how nutrition influences immune gene expression and disease risk. #epigenetics #nutrition #geneexpression #DNAmethylation #nutrigenomics #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Understanding EFSA: How Europe Protects Consumers Through Science-Based Regulation | ORIM
item.description: The European Food Safety Authority sets the global standard for supplement health claims. Learn how EFSA's rigorous process benefits European consumers. #EFSA #Europeanfoodsafety #healthclaimsregulation #supplementregulation #EUnutritionpolicy #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Fermented Foods of Scandinavia: Traditional Probiotics for Modern Immunity | ORIM
item.description: From Swedish surströmming to Icelandic skyr, Scandinavian fermented foods offer powerful probiotic benefits. Explore the science of traditional fermentation and gut immunity. #fermentedfoods #Scandinavia #probiotics #guthealth #kefir #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Food Allergies and Intolerances in Europe: The Immunonutrition Perspective | ORIM
item.description: Food allergies affect 17 million Europeans. Understanding the immune mechanisms and nutritional management strategies can improve quality of life significantly. #foodallergies #foodintolerances #Europeanprevalence #immuneresponse #guthealthallergies #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Coeliac Disease and Gluten Sensitivity in Europe: Beyond the Gluten-Free Trend | ORIM
item.description: Coeliac disease affects 1% of Europeans but 80% remain undiagnosed. Learn about the immunology, diagnosis, and nutritional management from European gastroenterology. #coeliacdisease #glutensensitivity #gluten-freeEurope #autoimmune #Europeangastroenterology #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: The Gut-Brain Axis: How European Research Links Nutrition to Mental Health | ORIM
item.description: European neuroscience reveals that gut bacteria influence mood, cognition, and mental health. Learn how immunonutrition supports the gut-brain connection. #gut-brainaxis #mentalhealthnutrition #psychobiotics #microbiomebrain #serotoningut #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Gut Health and the European Diet: Building a Resilient Microbiome | ORIM
item.description: How traditional European dietary patterns support gut microbiome diversity and immune function. Evidence from EFSA and European cohort studies. #guthealth #Europeandiet #microbiome #fibre #prebiotics #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: European Medicinal Herbs and Spices: Traditional Remedies Meets Modern Immunonutrition | ORIM
item.description: European herbal medicine has centuries of tradition. Modern European phytotherapy research validates many traditional herbs for immune and metabolic support. #medicinalherbs #Europeanphytotherapy #herbalmedicine #echinacea #elderberry #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Chronic Inflammation and Disease in Europe: The Nutrition Connection | ORIM
item.description: Chronic low-grade inflammation drives 71% of deaths in the WHO European Region. Discover how immunonutrition can address this silent health crisis. #chronicinflammation #Europeanhealth #NCD #anti-inflammatorynutrition #immunonutrition #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Intermittent Fasting: What European Clinical Evidence Actually Shows | ORIM
item.description: Intermittent fasting has exploded in popularity. European clinical trials provide nuanced evidence on its benefits for metabolism, immunity, and longevity. #intermittentfasting #clinicalevidence #time-restrictedeating #autophagy #metabolichealth #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Lactose Intolerance in Europe: Navigating Dairy Alternatives and Calcium Needs | ORIM
item.description: Lactose intolerance varies dramatically across Europe. Discover the genetic basis, regional differences, and evidence-based nutritional strategies for dairy-free Europeans. #lactoseintolerance #dairyalternatives #calciumsources #Europeangenetics #lactasepersistence #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Magnesium and Stress in Modern European Life: The Forgotten Mineral | ORIM
item.description: Stress depletes magnesium, and deficiency worsens stress. Learn how this vicious cycle affects European health and how to break it with evidence-based strategies. #magnesiumdeficiency #stress #modernlife #Europeanhealth #sleepquality #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Mediterranean Diet and Longevity: How Southern European Nutrition Extends Lifespan | ORIM
item.description: Explore the science behind the Mediterranean diet and its proven effects on longevity, immunity, and chronic disease prevention across Europe. EFSA-referenced evidence. #Mediterraneandiet #longevity #Europeannutrition #oliveoil #polyphenols #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Menopause, Nutrition, and Bone Health: A European Women's Health Guide | ORIM
item.description: Menopause increases osteoporosis risk for European women. Evidence-based immunonutrition strategies support bone health, hormonal balance, and immune function. #menopausenutrition #bonehealth #osteoporosis #calciumvitaminD #phytoestrogens #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Men's Health and Prostate Nutrition: European Research-Based Strategies | ORIM
item.description: Prostate health concerns affect most European men over 50. Evidence-based nutritional strategies from European urology research can support prostate and immune function. #menhealth #prostatenutrition #lycopene #zincprostate #selenium #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Metabolic Syndrome in Europe: Nutritional Strategies for Prevention and Reversal | ORIM
item.description: Metabolic syndrome affects 25% of European adults. Evidence-based nutritional interventions from European clinical research can help prevent and reverse it. #metabolicsyndrome #Europeanhealth #insulinresistance #visceralfat #nutritionintervention #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Microbiome Diversity in Europe: What Large-Scale Studies Reveal About Gut Health | ORIM
item.description: European research leads the world in microbiome science. Discover what MetaHIT and other landmark EU studies reveal about gut health and immune function. #microbiomediversity #Europeanguthealth #MetaHIT #gutbacteria #immunefunction #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: The Nordic Diet and Immune Health: A Scandinavian Approach to Immunonutrition | ORIM
item.description: Discover how the Nordic diet rich in fatty fish, berries, and whole grains strengthens immunity. Evidence-based insights from Scandinavian research on preventive nutrition. #Nordicdiet #immunity #Scandinaviannutrition #fattyfishomega-3 #immunonutrition #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Nutrigenomics and Personalised Nutrition: Europe's Frontier in Preventive Health | ORIM
item.description: European nutrigenomics research is pioneering personalised nutrition based on genetic profiles. Learn how your genes influence your nutritional needs and immune responses. #nutrigenomics #personalisednutrition #genetictesting #Europeanresearch #precisionnutrition #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Nuts and Seeds for Heart and Immune Health: European Dietary Traditions | ORIM
item.description: EFSA has approved health claims for walnuts. European research confirms that nuts and seeds provide essential fatty acids, minerals, and phytochemicals for immune resilience. #nuts #seeds #hearthealth #walnuts #almonds #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Obesity in Europe: Evidence-Based Nutrition Solutions Beyond Calorie Counting | ORIM
item.description: With obesity rates rising across Europe, immunonutrition offers science-based approaches that go beyond simple calorie restriction. European research insights. #obesityEurope #weightmanagement #nutritionsolutions #metabolichealth #gutmicrobiomeobesity #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Olive Oil Polyphenols: Europe's Liquid Gold for Immune and Heart Health | ORIM
item.description: EFSA-approved health claims confirm olive oil polyphenols protect against oxidative stress. Discover the immunonutrition science behind Europe's most treasured oil. #oliveoilpolyphenols #EFSAhealthclaims #hydroxytyrosol #oleocanthal #anti-inflammatory #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Omega-3 from Norwegian Fatty Fish: Europe's Best Source of Anti-Inflammatory Nutrition | ORIM
item.description: Norwegian salmon, mackerel, and herring provide the highest-quality omega-3 in Europe. Learn about EPA/DHA benefits for immunity and EFSA health claims. #omega-3 #Norwegianfish #EPADHA #anti-inflammatory #salmon #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Organic Farming and Nutrient Density: Does European Organic Food Deliver More? | ORIM
item.description: Europe leads the world in organic agriculture. Explore the evidence on whether organic European produce offers superior nutritional and immunological benefits. #organicfarming #nutrientdensity #Europeanorganic #pesticides #polyphenols #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: The ORIM Programme for Europe: Swiss Immunonutrition Science for Every European | ORIM
item.description: ORIM brings Swiss-precision immunonutrition to the European market. Discover our three-phase programme, eight core formulations, and science-first approach to immune health. #ORIMprogramme #immunonutritionEurope #Swisssupplements #preventivenutrition #immunehealthprogramme #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Plant-Based Protein in Europe: Meeting Immune Nutritional Needs Without Meat | ORIM
item.description: Plant-based diets are growing across Europe. Learn how to ensure adequate protein and micronutrient intake for optimal immune function on a plant-forward diet. #plant-basedprotein #Europeandiet #vegannutrition #immunefunction #aminoacids #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Pregnancy Nutrition and Immunity: European Guidelines for Maternal Health | ORIM
item.description: Maternal nutrition shapes the immune system of the next generation. European guidelines and immunonutrition research offer evidence-based support for expectant mothers. #pregnancynutrition #maternalimmunity #folicacid #DHApregnancy #prenatalsupplements #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Probiotics, Yoghurt, and Kefir: Europe's Living Foods for Immune Health | ORIM
item.description: From Greek yoghurt to Caucasian kefir, Europe's fermented dairy traditions offer powerful probiotic benefits. Science-backed guide to choosing the right products. #probiotics #yoghurt #kefir #fermenteddairy #guthealth #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Seasonal Eating in Europe's Temperate Climate: Aligning Nutrition with Nature | ORIM
item.description: Discover how eating seasonally in Europe's temperate climate optimises nutrient intake, supports immunity, and aligns with chronobiological rhythms. #seasonaleating #temperateclimate #Europeanseasons #chronobiology #nutrientdensity #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Skin Health, Nutrition, and Collagen: The European Dermatology-Nutrition Connection | ORIM
item.description: European dermatology research reveals how nutrition affects skin health, collagen production, and immune-mediated skin conditions. Evidence-based dietary strategies. #skinhealthnutrition #collagen #vitaminCskin #antioxidantsskin #dermatologynutrition #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Sleep, Nutrition, and Circadian Rhythms: The European Chronobiology Connection | ORIM
item.description: European chronobiology research reveals how nutrition affects sleep quality and circadian rhythms. Discover evidence-based dietary strategies for better sleep. #sleepnutrition #circadianrhythm #chronobiology #melatonin #tryptophan #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Sports Nutrition and Recovery: European Training Science Meets Immunonutrition | ORIM
item.description: European sports science leads the world in recovery nutrition research. Learn how immunonutrition supports athletic performance and immune resilience. #sportsnutrition #recovery #athleticperformance #exerciseimmunology #proteintiming #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Swiss Quality Standards for Nutritional Supplements: Why Precision Matters | ORIM
item.description: Swiss supplement manufacturing follows the world's strictest quality standards. Learn how OFSP regulations and Swiss precision ensure supplement safety and efficacy. #Swisssupplements #qualitystandards #OFSP #GMP #bioavailability #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Tea Polyphenols and Health: The European Tea Tradition and Immune Benefits | ORIM
item.description: Europeans consume billions of cups of tea annually. Discover how tea polyphenols, particularly EGCG and theaflavins, support immune function and metabolic health. #teapolyphenols #EGCG #greentea #blacktea #healthbenefits #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Turmeric and Curcumin Bioavailability: What European Research Reveals | ORIM
item.description: Curcumin shows powerful anti-inflammatory potential but poor bioavailability. European research has developed solutions. Learn the science of effective curcumin supplementation. #turmeric #curcumin #bioavailability #anti-inflammatory #NF-kB #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Ultra-Processed Foods in Europe: The Hidden Threat to Immune Health | ORIM
item.description: Ultra-processed foods now make up 25-50% of calories in European diets. European research reveals alarming links to inflammation, obesity, and immune dysfunction. #ultra-processedfood #UPF #Europeandiet #NOVAclassification #inflammation #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Vitamin D Deficiency in Northern Europe: The Silent Immune Crisis | ORIM
item.description: Up to 40% of Northern Europeans are vitamin D deficient. Learn how this affects immune function and what EFSA-compliant supplementation strategies can help. #vitaminDdeficiency #NorthernEurope #immunefunction #supplementation #EFSA #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Whole Grains, Dietary Fibre, and the Microbiome: European Evidence for Gut Health | ORIM
item.description: European populations consume diverse whole grains with proven prebiotic effects. EFSA-approved fibre health claims and microbiome research support grain-based gut health. #wholegrains #dietaryfibre #microbiome #prebiotics #oatbeta-glucan #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition

item.title: Zinc Deficiency in Europe: An Overlooked Threat to Immune Function | ORIM
item.description: Zinc deficiency affects immune function, wound healing, and metabolism. Learn about zinc status across Europe and evidence-based supplementation strategies. #zincdeficiency #immunefunction #zincsupplementation #Europeannutrition #EFSAzinc #ORIM #immunonutrition #nutrition
